commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR switches the bundled MiniMax music provider to request streaming hex output, decode SSE/audio responses, preserve JSON fallback handling, and add provider tests.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +65. Total +136 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level review: current main uses the direct MiniMax music POST with the 120s default timeout path, and the source PR supplies live MiniMax before/after proof. The PR-specific timeout regression is also source-reproducible because the shared timeout helper returns the lower of the default cap and remaining deadline.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical MiniMax provider/test repair suitable for the armed automerge lane; CI should be rechecked after that fix.

target.title: fix(minimax): stream music generation responses
target.body:
